'''''Star Wars Manga: A New Hope'' 2''' is the second volume in the ''[[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope]]'' series. It was illustrated by [[Hisao Tamaki]] and was based upon the original story by [[George Lucas]]. The cover art is by [[Adam Warren]].

In August [[1999]], the comic won the Eisner Award for Best U.S. Edition of Foreign Material.
